message:
refactor: continue stderr to slog migration in archive, checkpoint, scanner

Extend structured logging migration to additional modules:

internal/archive/archiver.go:
- Archive initial capture, capture, and flush error warnings
- Pane capture errors during archiving
- Flush on close errors

internal/checkpoint/capture.go:
- Scrollback capture failures
- Git state capture failures
- Assignment capture failures
- BV snapshot capture failures
- Session layout capture failures
- Untracked file count warnings

internal/scanner/notify.go:
- Scanner agent registration failures
- Reservation fetch failures
- Assignment store load failures
- Scan summary send failures

All changes replace fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: ...") with
structured slog.Warn() calls for consistent, filterable logging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
